_comment: MT-064 portable non-SQLite fixture corpus: narrative docs, story cards/beats, moodboards, and relationship rows. body_raw_text and moodboard raw_json_text preserve exact bytes (including whitespace). {{NONCE}} markers are substituted by the loader for run-uniqueness; the substituted bytes are what must round-trip. moodboard_uuid_field markers are replaced with fresh UUIDs at load time.
